name: agent402-langchain
description: Drop-in LangChain JS tools for Agent402: turn 1,000+ pay-per-call web tools into DynamicStructuredTool instances, with auto-payment (proof-of-work free, USDC via x402 paid). Works with LangGraph, agents, and LCEL chains. Zero deps.
author: Mikey Petrillo (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
